{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27405","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27405/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27405/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27405/events","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27405","id":2529099168,"node_id":"I_kwDOAA3dP86Wvv2g","number":27405,"title":"BUG: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'distutils.msvccompiler' on Linux","user":{"login":"PinkPandaKatie","id":1084661,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjEwODQ2NjE=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1084661?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie","html_url":"https://github.com/PinkPandaKatie","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/PinkPandaKatie/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":6359214,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw2MzU5MjE0","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/00%20-%20Bug","name":"00 - Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-16T17:53:03Z","updated_at":"2024-09-16T17:53:03Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

The module `numpy/distutils/command/config.py` unconditionally imports `numpy.distutils.mingw32ccompiler`, which unconditionally imports `distutilis.msvccompiler`. This module is not present on Linux, for obvious reasons.

The only function that `config.py` imports from `mingw32ccompiler` is `get_manifest`, which it only calls if `self.compiler.compiler_type == 'mingw32'`, which is plausible if cross compiling, I guess.

The only function that `mingw32ccompiler` imports from `distutils.msvccompiler` is `get_build_version` as `get_build_msvc_version`. `mingw32ccompiler.generate_manifest`,` calls this function, and is perfectly capable of handling if it returns `None`, indicating that MSVC is not installed.

The solution is as simple as catching `ImportError` when attempting to import `distutils.msvccompiler` and providing a stub for `get_build_msvc_version` which returns `None`:

```
try:
    from distutils.msvccompiler import get_build_version as get_build_msvc_version
except ImportError:
    def get_build_msvc_version():
        return None
```

I'll have a PR for this in just a few minutes.

### Reproduce the code example:

```python
import numpy.distutils.core
```


### Error message:

```shell
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<stdin>", line 1, in <module>
  File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/numpy/distutils/core.py", line 24, in <module>
    from numpy.distutils.command import config, config_compiler, \
  File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/numpy/distutils/command/config.py", line 19, in <module>
    from numpy.distutils.mingw32ccompiler import generate_manifest
  File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/numpy/distutils/mingw32ccompiler.py", line 30, in <module>
    from distutils.msvccompiler import get_build_version as get_build_msvc_version
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'distutils.msvccompiler'
```


### Python and NumPy Versions:

1.21.5
3.10.12 (main, Jul 29 2024, 16:56:48) [GCC 11.4.0]


### Runtime Environment:

_No response_

### Context for the issue:

I found this while creating a `setup.py` which uses `Cython.Build.cythonize` to auto-build a Cython module. The module itself doesn't even use numpy, but since it is installed, there is some hook which Cython picks up on which causes it to pull in `numpy.distutils.core`, which leads to the given error.
